(Sc-222) Order On Request To Make Payments 4.[X]The Court Will Make Orders On This Request After A Hearing, Which Will Take Place On Feb 26, 2018 At 3:30pm.
Off Calendar Apr-02-2018 Granted Per Written Order

SMALL CLAIM APPEALS
Off Calendar Nov-30-2017 Judgment Entered
MINI MINUTES: Appearances:
Appellant/Defendant: Magic Wood Floors, represented by Carlos Mongalo, present
Respondent/Plaintiff: Tad Nguyen, present

This cause comes on regularly for Trial de Novo. All parties and witnesses are sworn

Magic Wood Floors, Appellant/Defendant, represented by Carlos Mongalo, testifies on behalf of Appellant
Witness #1 Carlos Mongalo, Sr. (father) testifies on behalf of appellant Magic Wood Floors
Witness #2 Pablo (last name not provided, spanish speaking employee of Magic Wood Floors,) testifies on behalf of appellant assisted/interperted by Carlos Mangalo (son)

The following documentary evidence is introduced:
Exhibit 1 pictures (2 color copies) of bleached wood floors of the 2nd floor [work provided on respondents wood floor(s)]

Tad Nguyen, Respondent/Plaintiff testifies on his own behalf

The following documentary evidence is introduced
Exhibit A Copy of contract agreement dated 3-28-17
Exhibit B endorsed copy of untimely filed Notice of time and place of hearing on appeal

At the conclusion of the hearing, the matter is taken under submission.

Judge Pro Tem: Robert Stumpf; Clerk: W. Trupek; Not Reported (525)

PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM
Off Calendar Sep-11-2017 Judgment Entered

PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM
Off Calendar Jul-31-2017 Continued To Sep-11-17 At 03:30 P.M. In Dept 506
